title: Artifactory File Info
description: Schema for artifact file information returned by the Artifactory storage API, including metadata, checksums, and download URI.

repo.description: Repository key where the file is stored.

path.description: Path to the file within the repository.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file was first created.

createdBy.description: Username of the user who created/deployed the file.

lastModified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification.

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user who last modified the file.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update (including metadata changes).

downloadUri.description: Direct download URI for the artifact.

remoteUrl.description: Remote URL if this is a cached remote artifact.

size.description: File size in bytes. May be returned as a string or integer.

originalChecksums.description: Checksums as provided during deployment (before Artifactory verification).

uri.description: API URI for this file info resource.

checksums.description: File checksums in multiple hash algorithms.

sha1.description: SHA-1 hash of the file content.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the file content.

md5.description: MD5 hash of the file content.
